signin.title: Sign in into your account
signin.description: Enter your account information below to access.

email.title: Email
email.min_length: Email should be at least 4 characters

password.title: Password
password.min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.max_length: Password must be at most 50 characters

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your account information below to create it.

email_verification.title: Check your inbox
email_verification.description: We’ve sent a verification code to your email address. Please check your mailbox and enter the code below to verify your email.
email_verification.enter_code: Please, enter the code we sent to your email
email_verification.error_description: Oops! An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
email_verification.error_caption: Remember to use the link from the email. If the problem persists, please contact the support team.

errors.email_min_length: Email should be at least 6 characters
errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.password_number: Password must contain at least one number
errors.password_special_character: Password must contain at least one special character
errors.password_invalid_start: Password cannot start with a dot or newline
errors.confirm_password_min_length: Confirm password must be at least 8 characters
errors.phone_number_min_length: Phone number must be at least 10 characters
errors.first_name_min_length: First name must be at least 3 characters
errors.last_name_min_length: Last name must be at least 3 characters
errors.invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.user_already_exists: User already exists, please sign in or use a different information
errors.pin_min_length: Your verification code must be 6 digits
errors.token_verification: An error occurred while verifying the identity
errors.code_verification: An error occurred while verifying the code
errors.request_error: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request

hero.badge: Built for modern real estate managers
hero.description: HomiQ centralizes leasing, rent collection, maintenance, and reporting so property teams can scale faster while delivering better tenant experiences.

trusted.title: Trusted by property operators, asset managers & owner groups

features.label: Features
features.description: Manage properties, residents, owners, and finances from one place with workflows designed for teams that operate at scale.

rent_collection.title: Automated Rent Collection
rent_collection.description: Collect rent on time with reminders, autopay, and real-time payment tracking for every unit.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Workflows
maintenance.description: Route tenant requests to vendors fast, monitor status, and keep owners informed without extra admin.

analytics.title: Portfolio Analytics
analytics.description: Track occupancy, delinquency, and NOI with clean dashboards built for real estate operations.

portals.title: Owner & Tenant Portals
portals.description: Give stakeholders secure access to statements, leases, and updates from one shared platform.

cta.label: Get started today
cta.description: Join hundreds of property managers who streamlined their operations with HomiQ. Start free, scale as you grow.
